$comment: C11/C23 6.4.4.4: end-to-end wide/UTF character-constant value + width witness. Each prefixed char's value is the decoded code point and its sizeof is the prefix's element width (char16_t=2, char32_t=4, char8_t=1); narrow 'x' stays int (value 120, sizeof 4). Returns 42 only when every form lowered to the right core + value. Red-on-disable: dropping the wide char-typing override flips sizeof(u'A') to 4 → returns 6. Runs on all 4 targets + the release arm.
